translations.cv.landing.jobs.5.title: Frontend Architect
translations.cv.landing.jobs.5.description: ADNTRO Genetics · Full-time · May 2025 - May 2026 · Remote
translations.cv.landing.jobs.5.key-points.0: Defined frontend architecture for B2B/B2C apps using Nx monorepos and domain-driven libraries.
translations.cv.landing.jobs.5.key-points.1: Led migration of the monorepo from Angular 15 → Angular 21, introducing Signals and Standalone Components.
translations.cv.landing.jobs.5.key-points.2: Designed and implemented a zero-dependency design system with a Figma token integrated into custom Tailwind CSS.
translations.cv.landing.jobs.5.key-points.3: Built a reusable UI library following Atomic Design, adopted across 3+ apps, and replaced Angular Material and Taiga UI.
translations.cv.landing.jobs.5.key-points.4: Improved performance and bundle size by 60% through dependency removal and advanced lazy loading strategies.
translations.cv.landing.jobs.5.key-points.5: Implemented Storybook + MSW for component development and Playwright E2E tests into Bitbucket CI pipelines.
translations.cv.landing.jobs.5.key-points.6: Introduced AI-assisted development workflows to improve productivity and code quality.
translations.cv.landing.jobs.4.title: Front-End Manager
translations.cv.landing.jobs.4.key-points.0: Managed and provided technical leadership to 4 front-end development teams.
translations.cv.landing.jobs.4.key-points.1: Played a key role in scaling the company's engineering organization.
translations.cv.landing.jobs.4.key-points.2: Defined and implemented front-end development standards and best practices.
translations.cv.landing.jobs.4.key-points.4: Actively participated in design reviews using Figma.
translations.cv.landing.jobs.4.key-points.5: Mentored and developed junior and mid-level developers.
translations.cv.landing.jobs.3.title: Front-End Team Lead
translations.cv.landing.jobs.3.key-points.0: Established NX monorepo for front-end projects.
translations.cv.landing.jobs.3.key-points.1: Created an Angular library using Jest for unit testing.
translations.cv.landing.jobs.3.key-points.2: Created UI Libraries for E2E tests (Cypress & Storybook).
translations.cv.landing.jobs.3.key-points.3: Architected the main Angular App as a micro-front-end project.
translations.cv.landing.jobs.3.key-points.4: Led code reviews, and task assignments, and mentored junior developers.
translations.cv.landing.jobs.2.title: Front-End Angular Developer
translations.cv.landing.jobs.2.key-points.0: Developed and maintained two AngularJS apps for travel products.
translations.cv.landing.jobs.2.key-points.1: Analyzed business logic for impending migration to Angular 15.
translations.cv.landing.jobs.2.key-points.2: Collaborated with CTO, UI, and customer success teams.

translations.sc.landing.title: Welcome to Scribo: Share Your Stories with the World
translations.sc.landing.subtitle: Scribo is your personal space to create, share, and connect through the power of written articles. Whether you're an aspiring writer or a seasoned expert, Scribo provides the platform you need to express your ideas.
translations.sc.landing.features.title: Explore the Features
translations.sc.landing.features.cards.effortlessCrea: Craft your thoughts and ideas into compelling articles with our intuitive editor. Supports rich text formatting and easy media embedding.
translations.sc.landing.features.cards.seamlessReadin: Enjoy a clean and distraction-free reading environment. Discover new articles and engage with content that matters to you.
translations.sc.landing.features.cards.organizedManag: Easily manage your published articles. Update, edit, or remove your content whenever you need with our user-friendly interface.
translations.sc.landing.features.cards.personalizedPr: Create your own profile to showcase your articles and connect with other writers and readers on the platform.
translations.sc.landing.features.cards.realTimeCollab: Collaborate with other writers in real-time on articles, fostering teamwork and enhancing the creative process. (Coming Soon)
translations.sc.landing.features.cards.robustSearch.d: Easily find the articles you are looking for with our powerful search feature. Filter by keywords, authors, and categories.
translations.sc.landing.cta.title: Ready to Start Sharing?
translations.sc.landing.cta.subtitle: Join our community of writers and readers today!
